messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
Urgent PA request for a contrast CT of the abdomen for member NH-608453 with right lower quadrant pain, fever and elevated white blood cell count. Attached: emergency physician order and laboratory results.
